subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath adorned the brocaded pages of the Book of Being with the remembrance of the Beloved, through Whom the primal ornament was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی زین دیباج کتاب الوجود بذکر الحبیب الذی به ظهر الطراز الاول
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @exhortations and counsels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @personal instructions
